files_downloaded.description: 2024 statewide deer harvest statistics - summary by weapon type, general vs special permit, antlered vs antlerless. Total harvest: 26,564 deer, 29% success rate.
2024 statewide elk harvest statistics - summary by weapon type, general vs special permit. Total harvest: 5,033 elk, 10% success rate.
2024 deer general season harvest reports by district (17 districts) and GMU, broken down by weapon type and point class.
2024 elk general season harvest reports by district (17 districts) and GMU, broken down by weapon type and point class.
2024 deer special permit season harvest reports by district and GMU.
2024 elk special permit season harvest reports by district and GMU.
2025 deer special permit hunt listings with hunt codes, dates, permits available, and 2024 apps/avg points data per hunt. Contains draw odds proxy data (applications vs permits).
2025 elk special permit hunt listings with hunt codes, dates, permits available, and 2024 apps/avg points data per hunt. Contains draw odds proxy data (applications vs permits).
WDFW special hunt permit drawing result summaries page. Contains links to Power BI dashboards with overall results and species breakdown reports.
2024 special hunt permit draw updates including manually awarded permits info.
Main special hunt permits and raffles page with links to application info, results, and deer/elk hunt areas.
2025 Big Game Hunting Seasons and Rules pamphlet (effective April 2025 - March 2026). Contains season dates, GMU boundaries, permit quotas, and regulations for deer and elk.
2024 emergency rule with table of manually awarded special hunt permits.
Instructions for checking special hunt permit draw results in WILD licensing system.

needs_manual.description: WDFW Special Hunt Permit Draw Results - Overall Results Report (Power BI dashboard)
needs_manual.reason: Power BI dashboard - interactive report that cannot be downloaded as static data via curl. Must be accessed in browser. May have export options within the dashboard UI.

needs_manual.description: WDFW Special Hunt Permit Draw Results - Species Breakdown Report (Power BI dashboard, filterable by species/hunt/choice)
needs_manual.reason: Power BI dashboard - interactive report with deer and elk draw data. Cannot be scraped via curl. Open in browser and use Power BI export feature to download underlying data as CSV/Excel.

needs_manual.description: WILD licensing system - individual draw results portal
needs_manual.reason: Requires authentication/login to access individual draw results. Not scrapable.

notes: WDFW does NOT publish draw odds as downloadable CSV/Excel files. Draw result summaries are exclusively in Power BI dashboards hosted on app.powerbigov.us.
The Power BI dashboards (listed in needs_manual) are the PRIMARY source for draw odds data. They contain overall results and species-level breakdowns filterable by hunt name and choice.

The eRegulations pages (eregulations_deer_special_permits.html, eregulations_elk_special_permits.html) contain '2024 Apps/Avg Points' data per hunt which serves as a proxy for draw odds when combined with permit counts.
Harvest data is available as HTML tables on WDFW website - no CSV/Excel exports offered. Tables in the downloaded HTML files can be parsed programmatically.
The 2024 harvest HTML files contain detailed district-by-district, GMU-by-GMU data for both general season and special permit hunts.
Power BI dashboard data was last updated June 21, 2021 per the results page - may be outdated or may have been refreshed since.
Contact for draw data inquiries: wildthing@dfw.wa.gov or 360-902-2515
